meaning: Privacy Enhanced Mail 加密邮件
examples: X.509 Certificates can be PEM or DER encoded.
The rest of the output is an unencrypted PEM private key.
Pkcs12 files can be in PEM (as created by openssl pkcs12).
There are two dominant flavors of fuel cell: proton-exchange membrane (PEM) and solid oxide.
That's why consumer electronics makers are developing PEM cells that run on the more convenient methanol.
